hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\.cs'; then echo '⚠️ C# file modified — check mcp__UnityMCP__read_console for compilation errors before proceeding.'; fi

FILE_PATH=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oE '"[^"]*Assets/[^"]*"' | head -1 | tr -d '"'); if [ -n "$FILE_PATH" ]; then DIR=$(dirname "$FILE_PATH"); if [ -d "$DIR" ] && [ ! -f "$DIR/CLAUDE.md" ]; then echo 'Note: No CLAUDE.md in '"$DIR"' — consider creating one.'; fi; fi

FILE_PATH=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE_PATH" ] && [ -f "$FILE_PATH" ]; then REPO=$(git -C "$(dirname "$FILE_PATH")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$REPO" ]; then git -C "$REPO" add "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi; fi

FILE_PATH=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); LAST_FILE=$(cat /tmp/r8eox_last_edit 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE_PATH" ] && [ -n "$LAST_FILE" ] && [ "$FILE_PATH" != "$LAST_FILE" ]; then REPO=$(git -C "$(dirname "$LAST_FILE")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$REPO" ]; then STAGED=$(git -C "$REPO" diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$STAGED" ]; then git -C "$REPO" commit -m "auto: update $(basename "$LAST_FILE")" 2>/dev/null; fi; fi; fi; echo "$FILE_PATH" > /tmp/r8eox_last_edit

FILE_PATH=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE_PATH" ] && [ -f "$FILE_PATH" ] && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -q '.cs$'; then LINES=$(wc -l < "$FILE_PATH" | tr -d ' '); if [ "$LINES" -gt 250 ]; then echo "WARNING: $(basename "$FILE_PATH") is $LINES lines (limit: 300). Consider refactoring."; fi; fi

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(ProjectSettings/|Packages/manifest\.json|_RPAsset\.asset|_Renderer\.asset|UniversalRenderPipelineGlobalSettings)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not directly edit pipeline assets, ProjectSettings, or package manifest. Use Unity Editor or MCP tools instead.' >&2; exit 2; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.meta'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit .meta files directly — Unity manages these.' >&2; exit 2; fi
